'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"/rss.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=5n5OCRNzNrN2NP98GqqJijAd6bXxIM_sx_Zk9YDO7Q8-1776029808-1.0.1.1-Dczn0riJMo3J3mlSn_m3I774ubz8m6kd5HT7Nv7p7jI"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
